'''Bentails''' were large flying beasts native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Shaum Hii/Legends|Shaum Hii]]. [[Kian'thar]] [[derlac]] herders often rode bentails as they followed their herds across Shaum Hii's [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]]. The empathic Kian'thar often formed close bonds with their mounts, treating them more like beloved pets than simple work beasts.

{{Creature-stub}}
